params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer that selects between two possible program counter outputs based on a 2-bit select signal (PCSrc). When PCSrc is 0, the output PCout is set to the value of PC4; when PCSrc is 1, it selects PC4_imm; and for PCSrc values of 2 or higher, it outputs the jump address.
